summary: Tested Avatar Energy State Integration and Virtual Reality Cosmic Sanctuary features. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified. Energy state API returns proper data (current_energy, base_energy, energy_shift, current_mood, dominant_chakra, aura_state, activity_boosts, trend, recommendation). Avatar Creator page shows energy panel with dynamic visualization. VR page loads with all controls and portal legend.

issues: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console (should use THREE.Timer) - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar Energy State and VR features fully implemented and tested. GET /api/avatar/energy-state returns energy data based on user's moods and activities. Test user shows 50% energy (neutral mood, no recent activities). Avatar Creator at /avatar shows energy panel with chakra info, aura description, and recommendations. VR page at /vr is fullscreen immersive with 6 portals (Meditation, Breathwork, Yoga, Star Chart, Oracle, Teachings), energy HUD, and orbital camera controls. Navigation is hidden on VR page.
